e_g_hello_this_is_a_test_message: e.g. "Hello! This is a test message."
enter_phone_numbers_with_country_code_on: Enter phone numbers with country code (one per line, e.g., +1234567890)
integrate_twilio_into_the_workflow_can_s: Integrate Twilio into the workflow. Can send SMS messages.
send_a_one_time_verification_code_over_s: Send a one-time verification code over SMS for two-factor authentication.
send_a_personalized_sms_reminder_built_f: Send a personalized SMS reminder built from upstream data such as appointment or order details.
send_an_sms_notification_to_one_or_more: Send an SMS notification to one or more phone numbers via Twilio.
sms_delivery_status_queued_sent_delivere: SMS delivery status (queued, sent, delivered, etc.)
